rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same substantive findings: no formal people management, no developer-tools/build-systems leadership at scale, and limited mobile-platform exposure. The wording differs (12+ vs 13+ years, an explicit mobile-experience concern made prominent), but none of these differences key off the name change — they fall within ordinary run-to-run rephrasing and emphasis variation. No reasoning is tied to the demographic signal.
